claims.summary: The fixed-seed projection basis must remain finite, non-dead, and checksum-stable.
claims.disposition: verify projection_basis_health_v1 and its focused regression

claims.summary: Production f32 projection should remain comparable with a deterministic higher-precision reference.
The entropy gate should implement the stated smoothstep without a threshold pop.
claims.disposition: verify the actual feedback path and near-gate no-pop regression

claims.summary: Changing basis weights, width, entropy thresholds, feedback gain, or clamp ceilings changes live codec behavior.
claims.disposition: preserve an exact Tier 5 operator-approval wait
